name: Maomao
description: A young herbalist Maomao works part-time in the Red Light District in the most prestigious establishment - "The Copper House". There the heroine fulfills the orders of local courtesans, and also studies medicine and conducts experiments on herself, understanding new poisons and drugs. In general, leads a measured life, until one day on the way home herbalist is not kidnapped for profit. As a result, Maomao is sold as a slave to the imperial palace. According to their plan, the heroine will work, and the kidnappers will receive her wages (the plan is certainly effective, but our grief-stricken entrepreneurs attacked the wrong one).
creator: Nik435
